### **Interactive Tables and Unified Dashboard**
A single, real-time dashboard aggregating system health, high-priority alerts, and quick-action buttons.

### System-Wide Dark Mode for Prolonged Usage
A comprehensive dark mode theme that reduce eye fatigue, improve comfort and maintain focus during extended use.
